# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - deploy

variables:
  GITLAB_USER_EMAIL: "ci@example.com"
  GITLAB_USER_NAME: "CI Bot"

before_script:
  - export MR_TITLE=$(curl --header "PRIVATE-TOKEN: $CI_JOB_TOKEN" "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_URL" | jq -r '.title')
  - export MR_DESCRIPTION=$(curl --header "PRIVATE-TOKEN: $CI_JOB_TOKEN" "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_URL" | jq -r '.description')

build:
  stage: build
  script:
    - echo "Building the application"
  after_script:
    - echo "Build completed. MR Title: $MR_TITLE"

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Deploying the application"
    - echo "Deployment Tag: $MR_TITLE"
    - echo "Release Notes: $MR_DESCRIPTION"
  only:
    - master
  tags:
    - $MR_TITLE

notifications:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Sending build notifications"
    - echo "Build results with MR Title: $MR_TITLE and Description: $MR_DESCRIPTION"
  when: on_success
  only:
    - merge_requests
